CIT.notes: CIT 25%; SME first €100k profit taxed at 20% (reduced rate); crisis contribution abolished; innovation income deduction 85%

VAT.notes: Standard 21%; intermediate 12% (restaurant food, phytopharmaceuticals, social housing); reduced 6% (basic foodstuffs, books, renovation, electricity for residential)

IIT.notes: Progressive 25-50%; communal surcharge ~7% on top (avg); solidarity contribution 2% on very high pensions; effective top ~54%
